channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: US-Iran escalation threatens oil supply recovery, warns IEA
item.description: Sources suggest that the ceasefire can be revived amid a lull in fighting and backroom diplomacy.

item.title: US-Iran war: Will peace talks resume, and when?
item.description: While Trump said the MoU with Iran is 'over', US officials have reaffirmed Washington's commitment to continue talks.

item.title: Condemned ex-PM Hasina plans December return to Bangladesh
item.description: Despite facing a death sentence, exiled Sheikh Hasina pledges to return, setting up a legal clash with Dhaka’s leaders.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Day 29
item.description: FIFA World Cup 2026: Day 29

item.title: Pride despite defeat as Morocco’s World Cup run ends
item.description: Pride despite defeat as Morocco's World Cup run ends

item.title: Conor McGregor vs Max Holloway 2 at UFC 329: All you need to know
item.description: McGregor, who won the first bout against Holloway in 2013, has not fought in the Octagon since July 2021.

item.title: How an Egypt-Argentina World Cup game became a referendum on Palestine
item.description: Contested calls and rival flags showed how Palestine now shapes debates over power and fairness in sport.

item.title: Fall in funding cuts aid to 1 million women: UN
item.description: The US was the first to slash billions in foreign assistance in 2025, but other major donors have followed suit.

item.title: How Hamas Governed Gaza
item.description: Hamas is dissolving its government and handing power over to a new technocratic administration.

item.title: India is becoming a shaping power
item.description: Modi’s tour of Indonesia, Australia and New Zealand reveals a broader Asia Pacific strategy.

item.title: UK police confront Morocco fans over unrest after World Cup loss
item.description: UK police confront Morocco fans over unrest after World Cup loss

item.title: EU states do not need ‘consensus’ to hold Israel accountable
item.description: As foreign ministers meet on Gaza and the West Bank, national governments cannot hide behind EU paralysis.

item.title: Trump grants Kyiv Patriots licences: What’s next in the Russia-Ukraine war?
item.description: Kyiv will rush to produce the systems domestically as Russia struggles to defend itself against some Ukrainian attacks.

item.title: Bomb attacks rattle Damascus but for most Syrians, life goes on
item.description: The Damascus attacks appeared to be attempts to cause instability, but don't signal total security breakdown in Syria.

item.title: Watch World Cup: France ends Morocco’s run, cruises into semifinals
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: Degree but no job: The battle against unemployment in Gaza
item.description: Gaza's young graduates face sky-high unemployment as Israel's war devastates job market.

item.title: Bodies found in cars as deadly Spain wildfire kills at least 12
item.description: Bodies found in cars as deadly Spain wildfire kills at least 12

item.title: Administration without sovereignty will not free Palestine
item.description: The end of Hamas governance in Gaza may change who administers it, but not who holds power over Palestinian life.

item.title: Bayeux Tapestry smuggled into Britain for first visit in 1,000 years
item.description: The loan of the artwork is seen as symbolic of French-British relations as London works to mend ties post-Brexit.

item.title: England vs Norway: All to know ahead of FIFA World Cup quarterfinal
item.description: Haaland vs Kane and other key factors before World Cup 2026 showdown between England and Norway in Miami.

item.title: Wildfires in southern Spain kill at least 12
item.description: Andalusia's deadliest fire comes as heatwaves across Europe have left swaths of the continent highly vulnerable.

item.title: The US is building a new pressure architecture against Iran
item.description: Trump’s NATO diplomacy is part of a wider effort to weaken Tehran by reshaping the region around it.

item.title: ‘Unstoppable force’: Mbappe’s France crush Morocco’s World Cup dreams
item.description: Morocco came to the quarterfinal with high hopes and revenge on their minds, only to be met with the in-form team.

item.title: South Korea’s SK Hynix raises $26.5bn in record-breaking US IPO
item.description: South Korean chip giant makes largest-ever debut by a foreign firm in the US, eclipsing Alibaba's 2014 IPO.

item.title: Spain vs Belgium: World Cup quarterfinal – prediction, start time, lineups
item.description: Spain, aiming to reach the semifinals for the first time since 2010, face Belgium in Friday's contest in Los Angeles.
